query: SELECT 'partnerDocuments' as tbl, CASE WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%drive.google%' THEN 'GDrive' WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 'S3' ELSE 'Other' END as dest, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM partnerDocuments GROUP BY dest UNION ALL SELECT 'fileAttachments', CASE WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%drive.google%' THEN 'GDrive' WHEN fileUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 'S3' ELSE 'Other' END, COUNT(*) FROM fileAttachments GROUP BY dest;
